deep grief and pride; in (5) will come by wealth through women,
have an excellent wife and few children; in (6) will do ignoble
deeds; in (9) will be respected for his virtues and rich, in (10) and
(11) he will be attractive, curbed by women and addicted to a
wicked woman; and in (12) he will be a scholar, very rich, very
handsome and receiving homage from kings.
Saturn in (1) rhakos one foolish, wanderer, a hypocrite and
friendless; in (2) loved by a forbidden woman, poor and with
many wives; in (3) and (6) shameless, without happiness, wealth
and issue, of shaky writing, be a police officer and a chieftain;
in (4) be penniless, toothless, ignorant, childless and motherless:

RASI EFFECTS 91
in (5) be mean, without happiness and sons, and a labourer;
in (7) famous, rich and head of a clan, city, village or army; in
(8) one will suffer imprisonment or a fatal attack, be fickle-
minded and merciless; in (9) and (12) be happy at the end or
